examples: This study can help refractories enterprises in south China resolve their problem such as low content tridymite and properties of silica brick for coke oven.
The notes describe the common minerals such as quartz and its polymorphs, coesite, tridymite and cristobalite, feldspar, plagioclase, feldspathoids, pyroxenes, amphiboles, etc.
The microstructure of crystallized cristobalite, tridymite andmelanophlogite have been studied and the effect of crystallization on sintering of compositealso has been discussed.
